THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAINTSING, LIZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP. $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $705.00, THE JUDGMENT REFLECTS AN ADJUSTMENT TO PLAINTIFF'S RENT DUE TO REDUCED SERVICES. CASE DISMISSED WITHPREJUDICE AS TO: NANCY LIN JOE; MICHAEL YUAN; JUDY LIN; BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-07-2008 AT 10:00AM.
